name: Simple Oil Moisturizer
description: Single-ingredient oil moisturizing using jojoba (closest to human sebum), argan, or coconut oil — replacing an entire shelf of creams, serums, and lotions that are mostly water + emulsifier + fragrance.
replaces: Face cream, body oil, serum ($10–30 each)
effectivenessNote: Simple and effective for most skin types. Jojoba is non-comedogenic and balances oil production. Lacks targeted actives (retinol, peptides) found in specialty products.
warnings: Coconut oil is comedogenic for some faces (4/5 on comedogenicity scale)
Apply to damp skin for best absorption
A few drops is sufficient — over-application feels greasy
scienceNote: Jojoba oil is technically a liquid wax ester with a composition closest to human sebum among plant oils. It does not clog pores and helps regulate the skin's own oil production through feedback mechanisms.
